subject: [DCAEGEN2-SERVICE] Add policy sync for slicems
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2-SERVICE] Add policy sync for slicems

Add policy sync as a  side car to provide runtime configuration for
slicems

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3195
Signed-off-by: qingshuting <qingshuting1@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I6e63ca76c5dab641a1347909439f74a873903ad2

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 3: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 599881073), max time: 24400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Hi all, I added a side car policy sync for dcae slicems to provide runtime configuration. Please review. :)

Patch Set 3:

Just curious to know why this patch was abandoned in favor of new https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/130171?

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> Just curious to know why this patch was abandoned in favor of new https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/130171?

Oh it's kind of a long story. I met a problem when git commit, there were 2 change id, and warned that i was 2 commit before master. So i deleted the local repo, and repull patch3. But this time it said another local proj is also modifing on this proj (I think it mean the one i deleted). So I abandoned this one.
